nodes.label: AI as brainstorming partner for idea generation

nodes.label: AI as writing revision tool for polishing drafts

nodes.grounding_span: AI does a pretty good job of cleaning that stuff up

nodes.label: Preservation of personal writing voice and style

nodes.label: AI as tone moderator for professional communication
nodes.label_negative: AI sanitizing authentic emotion in communication
nodes.grounding_span: I put those initial angry drafts into AI and ask for the message to be preserved

nodes.label: Maintenance of human social and relational intelligence
nodes.label_negative: Delegation of social decisions to AI

nodes.label: Creative autonomy and personal expression

nodes.label: Authentic interpersonal connection
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to forfeit social/relational intelligence

nodes.label: Overall satisfaction with AI for efficiency gains
nodes.grounding_span: On the balance, I have to say I'm very satisfied with AI

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's failure to preserve voice
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated and say 'NO EM DASHES EVER'

nodes.label: Deliberate resistance to using AI for social interactions
Iterative refinement through multiple AI interactions
nodes.grounding_span: It usually takes a few iterations of generating and refining ideas

nodes.label: Deliberate boundary-setting between AI and human domains
nodes.grounding_span: I still do most of my own writing and drafting
